name: api20100401authorized_connect_app
description: Manage api20100401authorized connect app — retrieve a list of authorized-connect-apps belonging to the account used to make the request, fetch an instance of an authorized-connect-app. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: AccountSid
parameters.description: The SID of the [Account](https://www.twilio.com/docs/iam/api/account) that created the AuthorizedConnectApp resources to read.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: How many resources to return in each list page. The default is 50, and the maximum is 1000.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: The page index. This value is simply for client state.

parameters.name: PageToken
parameters.description: The page token. This is provided by the API.
